Services

AI Workers for high-friction business workflows

Deploy digital employees across proposals, finance, customer success, compliance, risk, security, and knowledge operations.

▣

AI RFP / Proposal Response Agent

Drafts compliant, buyer-specific proposal responses using your past wins, documents, and pricing logic.

Outcome: Submit stronger proposals in less time.
◈

AI Contract Review Assistant

Flags risky clauses, missing terms, renewal obligations, and approval bottlenecks before contracts stall.

Outcome: Reduce legal review cycles and risk.
◎

AI Due Diligence Analyst

Synthesizes financial, operational, market, and vendor information into decision-ready diligence briefs.

Outcome: Accelerate decisions with less analyst time.
▤

AI Financial Reporting Analyst

Prepares KPI summaries, variance explanations, management packs, and recurring finance narratives.

Outcome: Turn raw reporting into executive insight.
$

AI Accounts Receivable Collection Agent

Monitors invoices, sends polite follow-ups, updates CRM notes, and escalates overdue accounts.

Outcome: Improve cash flow without extra headcount.
⌕

AI Enterprise Search / Knowledge Agent

Lets teams ask natural-language questions across policies, SOPs, documents, tickets, and internal knowledge.

Outcome: Find answers instantly across the business.
↗

AI Customer Success Expansion Agent

Identifies expansion signals, churn risks, renewal moments, and account follow-up opportunities.

Outcome: Grow accounts with proactive outreach.
◇

AI Vendor Risk Management Agent

Tracks vendors, compliance documents, security questionnaires, renewals, and risk changes.

Outcome: Control vendor exposure at scale.
⚿

AI Cybersecurity Triage Agent

Classifies alerts, enriches incidents, drafts tickets, and routes security events to the right owner.

Outcome: Respond faster to security signals.
◷

AI Regulatory Change Monitor

Watches regulatory updates, summarizes business impact, and alerts teams to required policy changes.

Outcome: Stay ahead of compliance changes.

How it works

From workflow analysis to deployed AI workers

01

We Analyze Your Workflow

We map repetitive tasks, data sources, approvals, and ROI potential.

02

We Deploy AI Workers

We configure AI agents, connect systems, define guardrails, and launch controlled workflows.

03

You Scale Without Hiring

Your team moves faster while AI Workers handle repeatable execution around the clock.

ROI

Measure AI by business outcomes

Every AI Worker is designed around a measurable operational result: reduced cost, faster response, better conversion, or fewer repetitive tasks.

Reduced operational costs by upto

95%

Faster response times by upto

82%

Improved lead conversion by upto

3.1x

Less repetitive work by upto

70%

Built with love and care in Waterloo, Ontario

AI Workers is crafted by a Canadian team focused on helping businesses scale with practical, dependable AI automation built close to home.
